booseapp/BOOSEapp.AppCanvas.html.title: Class AppCanvas | BOOSEapp
booseapp/BOOSEapp.AppCanvas.html.summary: Class AppCanvas Namespace BOOSEapp Assembly BOOSEapp.dll Implements the ICanvas interface with custom drawing functionality. Manages bitmap and graphics to render shapes and lines. public class AppCanvas : ICanvas Inheritance object AppCanvas Implements ICanvas Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors AppCanvas(int, int) Constructor initialises canvas and pen with specified parameters. public AppCanvas(int xSize, int ySize) Parameters xSize int Width of the canvas ySize int Height of the canvas Properties PenColour Gets or sets the colour of the pen and brush. public object PenColour { get; set; } Property Value object Xpos Gets or sets the X co-ordinate of the pen. public int Xpos { get; set; } Property Value int Ypos Gets or sets the Y co-ordinate of the pen. public int Ypos { get; set; } Property Value int Methods Circle(int, bool) Draws a circle centred on the current pen position. public void Circle(int radius, bool filled) Parameters radius int The radius of the circle. filled bool Determines whether to fill in the circle with selected colour. Clear() Clears the canvas setting it to the default window colour. public void Clear() DrawTo(int, int) Draws a line from the current pen position to the specified co-ordinates. Updates the pen position to the specified co-ordinates. public void DrawTo(int x, int y) Parameters x int X co-ordinate. y int Y co-ordinate. MoveTo(int, int) Updates the pen position to the specified co-ordinates public void MoveTo(int x, int y) Parameters x int X co-ordinate. y int Y co-ordinate. Rect(int, int, bool) Draws a rectangle at current pen position. Also determines whether it should be filled in or not. public void Rect(int width, int height, bool filled) Parameters width int Width of the rectangle. height int Height of the rectangle. filled bool Determines whether to fill the rectangle in with the currently selected colour. Reset() Resets the pen to the default position and colour. public void Reset() Set(int, int) Re-initializes the canvas with specified dimensions. public void Set(int width, int height) Parameters width int Width of canvas. height int Height of canvas. SetColour(int, int, int) Sets the colour of the pen (outline) and brush (fill) using RGB values. public void SetColour(int red, int green, int blue) Parameters red int Colour red value, from 0-255. green int Colour green value, from 0-255. blue int Colour blue value, from 0-255. Tri(int, int) Draws a triangle centred on the current pen position. public void Tri(int width, int height) Parameters width int Width of triangle base. height int Height of triangle from base to tip. WriteText(string) Renders text onto the canvas at the current pen position. public void WriteText(string text) Parameters text string Text to display. getBitmap() Gets the drawing object displayed as a bitmap. Used by UI to render canvas content to the display. public object getBitmap() Returns object The bitmap object containing all objects drawn so far.

booseapp/BOOSEapp.html.title: Namespace BOOSEapp | BOOSEapp
booseapp/BOOSEapp.html.summary: Namespace BOOSEapp Classes AppCanvas Implements the ICanvas interface with custom drawing functionality. Manages bitmap and graphics to render shapes and lines. AppCircle Custom implementation of the Circle command to bypass BOOSE library restrictions. Acts as a bridge between the parsed user input and AppCanvas methods. AppCommandFactory Custom implementation of the CommandFactory to bypass BOOSE library restrictions. Acts as a central hub to return custom bridge commands instead of library defaults. AppDrawTo Custom implementation of the DrawTo command to bypass BOOSE library restrictions. Acts as a bridge between the parsed user input and AppCanvas methods. AppForm The main user interface for the BOOSE application. Provides the entry point for commands and the canvas display area. AppMoveTo Custom implementation of the MoveTo command to bypass BOOSE library restrictions. Acts as a bridge between the parsed user input and AppCanvas methods. AppRect Custom implementation of the Rect command to bypass BOOSE library restrictions. Acts as a bridge between the parsed user input and AppCanvas methods. AppTri Custom implementation of the Tri command to bypass BOOSE library restrictions. Acts as a bridge between the parsed user input and AppCanvas methods. AppWrite Custom implementation of the Write command to render text on the canvas. Acts as a bridge between the parsed user text and the AppCanvas methods.
